label: E17
original_formula: =IF(OR(AND(D6="Life Shield ROP",Calc!$I$4>Calc!$I$5,Calc!$I$4-Calc!$I$5<5),Calc!$I$4<Calc!$I$5,AND(D6="Life Shield ROP",D17="Pay Till 60",Age<25)),"Premium Payment Term Is Not Valid","")
math_logic: =IF(OR(AND(D6="Life Shield ROP",Calc!I4>Calc!I5,Calc!I4-Calc!I5<5),Calc!I4<Calc!I5,AND(D6="Life Shield ROP",D17="Pay Till 60",Age<25)),"Premium Payment Term Is Not Valid","")
